area: Red/engineering identity information from owner-supplied screenshots

evidence.notes: Screenshots were supplied by the vehicle/unit owner in prior conversations. The owner confirmed on 2026-07-12 that the extracted readings are accurate and require no re-capture for evidence acceptance.

notes: Captured owner-attested readings: HNav_EU_K0257_5_D1, Variant 9307, RadioUnit 9471, MU 0187 and Sample d1. CONFIRMED applies to the visible/transcribed readings only. Sample d1 is not proven to be equivalent to hwSample.
